title: Lightning (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the Nebulon-B frigate|[[Lightning (Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport)|the ''Delta''-class transport of the same name]]}}
'''''Lightning''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It served as a [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] on multiple simulation missions that [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] went through.

==History==
The '''Lightning''' attacked and destroyed number of small [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] footholds in various parts of space. The missions involved sending a single [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptor]] to clear a minefield and steal equipment from a [[Class-A cargo container]] [[Koss (Class-A cargo container)|''Koss'']] protected by a minefield, destroying a Rebel depot which consisted of [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] ''[[Revt]]'' [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transports]] ''[[Bultz]]'', [[Container transport]] [[Moth/Legends|''Moth'']] and containers with starfighters for defense. Finally, a Rebel starfighter base consisting of 3 containers [[Retuna]], [[Reyve]] and [[Garble]] and was filled with multiple starfighters, a single transport ''[[Trole]]'' and some [[Utility Tug/Legends|tugs]] ''[[Toone]]'' and finally two [[Cargo ferry|cargo ferries]] ''[[Juble]]''.

All these events were recorded and recreated to be training simulations in the [[Combat chamber]] to train future [[TIE pilot|pilots]] such as [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
